subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the divine Call! That which thou didst write was evidence of thy conduct upon the path and proof of heavenly favours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بندای الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی دلیل سلوک بر سبیل بود و برهان الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
